title: Spears
description: A simple datapack that adds a copy of the spears from the latest snapshot to older releases of the game.
body:
A simple datapack that adds a copy of the spears from the snapshot 25w42a to older releases of the game.

### Includes:
- Accurate item models and accurate weapon attributes.
- Charge ability: when holding right click deal damage to entities 2-4.5 blocks infront of you based on your current velocity.
- Lunge enchantment: obtained through the enchanting table or trading with villagers, upon right click dash forward an amount and lose durability based on level.

### Supported versions:
1.21.9-1.21.10
